name: mira-dashboard-backend
description: Gateway Mirror backend for Mira Dashboard

scripts.start: doppler run --config prd --project rajohan -- node dist/serverStart.js
scripts.dev: doppler run --config prd --project rajohan -- tsx watch src/serverStart.ts
scripts.test:coverage: npm run build && c8 --all --src src --extension=.ts --extension=.js --report-dir coverage --reporter=lcovonly --reporter=text-summary --check-coverage --lines=100 --branches=100 --functions=100 --statements=100 node --test-isolation=process --test-concurrency=1 --import tsx --test "src/**/*.test.*" "test/**/*.test.*"
